summary: Performance Tracking Module testing completed successfully. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI loads correctly with all required components: selectors (plan, resource, month, year), summary cards, Revenue/Account/Pipeline/Outstanding/Activity/Support sections, Month-on-Month Comparison table, and KPI cards. Save Draft and Submit buttons work correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_performance_tracking.py - Created comprehensive test file for Performance Tracking module
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing target plan and resource data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracking Module is fully functional. Backend endpoints all working: GET /api/performance/target-plans, GET /api/performance/resources-for-plan/{plan_id}, GET /api/performance/generate, POST /api/performance/save, POST /api/performance/{id}/submit, POST /api/performance/{id}/approve, POST /api/performance/{id}/return, GET /api/performance/comparison. Frontend PerformanceTracker.js renders all components correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

verified: GET /api/performance/target-plans returns 200 with list of plans
Each plan has id and name fields
Unauthenticated request returns 401
GET /api/performance/resources-for-plan/{plan_id} returns 200 with list of resources
Each resource has resource_id and resource_name fields
Invalid plan_id returns empty list (not 404)
GET /api/performance/generate returns full metrics structure
Response includes: resource_id, resource_name, month, year, plan_id, monthly_target
Revenue section: achieved, target, achievement_pct, from_new_accounts, from_existing_accounts
Accounts section: existing_count, new_onboarded, existing_accounts list, new_accounts list
Pipeline section: current_value, current_count, next_month_value, coverage_ratio
Collections section: total_outstanding, aging buckets, outstanding_ratio
Activities section: visits, calls, follow_ups
Calculated KPIs: achievement_pct, pipeline_coverage, outstanding_ratio
Invalid plan_id returns 404
Missing params returns 422
POST /api/performance/save creates new record with status=draft
POST /api/performance/{id}/submit transitions to submitted status
POST /api/performance/{id}/return transitions to returned status with comments
Can resubmit after return
POST /api/performance/{id}/approve transitions to approved status
Cannot edit approved record (returns 400)
Invalid record_id returns 400 for submit/approve
GET /api/performance/comparison returns month-on-month data
Response includes resource_id and months array
Each month has: month, year, label, revenue_achieved, monthly_target, achievement_pct, new_accounts, pipeline_value, total_outstanding, visits, calls
Missing params returns 422
Page loads at /performance route
Performance Tracker nav link in sidebar under Lead & Sales Operations
data-testid='performance-tracker' present
Selectors section with plan, resource, month, year dropdowns
Generate button triggers API call
Summary cards show: Target, Achieved, Existing Accounts, New Accounts, Pipeline, Outstanding, Visits/Calls
Revenue Metrics section with target, achieved, achievement %, from new/existing
Account Metrics section with existing/new counts (expandable)
Pipeline Metrics section with current value, count, next month value, coverage ratio (expandable)
Collections/Outstanding section with total, aging buckets (expandable)
Activity Metrics section with visits, calls, follow-ups, productivity
Support Needed section with clickable category badges
Remarks textarea for additional comments
Manual override inputs for revenue, visits, calls
Month-on-Month Comparison table with 3 months and trend arrows
Performance KPIs section with Achievement %, Pipeline Coverage, Outstanding Ratio, Productivity, Conversion Rate
Save Draft and Submit buttons work correctly
Status badge shows current record status (Not Created, Draft, Submitted, Approved, Returned)
